claim: H3 residuals imply universal exact-component dependency
basis: Only A02→C06 is positive; other tested components are weak, negative, or operation-family-level.

claim: H3 residuals identify useful candidate intervention sites
basis: H2-selected C06 produced a localized positive exact-component result; C07 produced informative boundary results.

claim: Exact-component dependency is heterogeneous across components/composites
basis: A02→C06 positive; A00→C06 weak; A04→C07 operation-family; A03→C07 negative.

claim: Controlled B1 evidence generalizes causally to real LLMs
basis: No real LLM interventions have been run; any LLM evidence would be observational only.
